entity.summary: Multichain decentralized trading protocol historically combining spot and perpetual markets, now retaining registry activity while its current first-party site presents a forthcoming index-backed borrowing product.
entity.notes: The current first-party site remains reachable but now presents a coming-soon index-backed borrowing product rather than the prior trading interface. DefiLlama still preserves the Amped decentralized trading identity, residual TVL, fees, DEX volume, and perpetual volume across multiple chains. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead until the exchange identity and current product direction are clearer.

evidence.title: Amped Finance current first-party site
evidence.notes: The reachable first-party site currently presents a forthcoming index-backed borrowing product, showing that the brand remains live while the exchange product identity is in transition.

evidence.title: Amped Finance protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data preserves Amped as a decentralized trading protocol combining spot and perpetual markets across multiple chains.

evidence.title: Amped Finance protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Current protocol data preserves residual liquidity, fees, DEX volume, and perpetual volume, supporting a limited rather than dead classification during the product transition.
